title: Copilot usage metrics API now available
raw_changelog: New API endpoints for accessing Copilot usage metrics within your organization.
before_text:
## Copilot API

### Endpoints
- GET /orgs/{org}/copilot/billing - Get Copilot billing information
after_text:
## Copilot API

### Endpoints
- GET /orgs/{org}/copilot/billing - Get Copilot billing information
- GET /orgs/{org}/copilot/usage - Get Copilot usage metrics
- GET /orgs/{org}/copilot/usage/seats - Get seat assignment details

### Usage Metrics Response
```json
{
  "total_active_users": 150,
  "total_engaged_users": 120,
  "day": "2026-02-20",
  "breakdown": [
    { "editor": "vscode", "active_users": 100, "suggestions_accepted": 5000 }
  ]
}
```

ground_truth.action_required: No action required. New endpoints available for Copilot usage tracking.
